summary: DOB attributes longer waits for construction inspections to ongoing budget constraints and reduced inspector staffing capacity. A 2025 city Comptroller audit similarly found staffing reductions and diversion of staff to training and system changes contributed to slower processing across DOB's development-review functions.

sources.label: NYC Comptroller, Audit of the New York City Department of Buildings' Enforcement of Building Codes (Apr. 21, 2025)

oneLiner: increasing, which DOB attributes to budget constraints and reduced staffing
